How it works

Your night, optimized
by the crowd

01

Explore nearby venues

Browse bars, clubs, and hidden gems on a live map. Filter by vibe — rooftop, live music, craft cocktails, sports bar, and more.

02

Cast your 3 daily votes

Every day you get 3 votes. Use them on your favorites. Scarcity makes every vote count — the leaderboard reflects real enthusiasm.

03

See tonight's hotspots

Hotspot Scores update in real time as votes pour in. Watch bars climb the leaderboard before you even leave the house.

Features

Built for the night

94

Hotspot Score

A live 0–100 score derived from real crowd votes. Not star ratings, not follower counts — just where people are actually choosing to go tonight.

3/day

3 Votes a Day

Scarcity makes votes matter. With just 3 votes per day, you're intentional — and the leaderboard reflects real enthusiasm, not noise.

TrendingRooftopLive MusicOpen Now

Filter by Vibe

Trending, Open Now, Live Music, Rooftop, Craft Cocktails, Dog Friendly — 10 filters so you always find your kind of spot.

#1
94
#2
90
#3
92

City Rankings

See the live leaderboard for your city. Watch venues climb and fall throughout the night as votes pour in — know what's hot before you arrive.
